header_detection: Repeated table headers per producer/region section. Main wine header uses Code, product name column, Type, Vol., Vintage, Rating, FB Price, Retail Price, Remark.
name_column: Unnamed product column after Code / Item depending section
vat_handling: prices appear net source values; confirm VAT policy
normalization_strategy: Spreadsheet parser with repeated-header detection. Carry section/producer and region context from heading rows. For Monin/water sections use alternate Code/Item/Size/Price profile.
notes: One supplier file may contain wine, syrup, water, and planogram tabs/sections. Need skip non-product planning sheets.

notes: Variant code shares folder with AA. Do not duplicate rows unless category filter is set.

header_detection: Single clean header row: ID, Code, Product, Normal Price, Discount.
cost_column: calculated from Normal Price and Discount
normalization_strategy: Simple spreadsheet parser. Calculate supplier cost as Normal Price * (1 - Discount). Website price should use formula because this bucket is NO RSP.
notes: Sample file is Coravin/accessory focused; same folder may include catalog PDFs.

notes: Cost should probably use VAT-included cost for database if current costs are VAT-included; confirm accounting policy.

normalization_strategy: Do not auto-commit from PDF extraction. First build PDF-to-draft extractor that proposes rows, then require human normalized CSV approval.
notes: Needs OCR/table extraction review. Some prices appear as 675.- etc near barcode blocks.

header_detection: PDF catalogue with country/region sections. Product blocks include name, Size, Region, Product Type, vintage, and price.
vat_handling: condition says prices are subject to 7% VAT
normalization_strategy: PDF catalogue parser can draft rows from Size/Region/Product Type/price blocks. Human review required before SKU/cost/RSP update because item codes are not visible.
notes: Good product detail but weak database keys. Matching should rely on normalized name, size, vintage, region, and product type.

header_detection: PDF text is structured like a table. Repeated header: Item Code, Type, Product, Vintage, Wine-Now NTT, Regular RSP incl VAT, Regular RSP excl VAT, Wine-Now margin.
vat_handling: remark says price above exclude VAT 7%
normalization_strategy: PDF table parser can draft reliable rows from item-code line pattern, then validate RSP incl/excl VAT and margin.
notes: Strong supplier item code and pricing columns. Need confirm whether Wine-Now NTT is supplier cost or internal net trade term.

header_detection: Clean workbook/table. Header includes Code, Type, Names, Grapes or Ingredient, Region, Country, Vintage, Wholesale Price (THB), RSP (THB), sometimes Promotion (THB).
normalization_strategy: Spreadsheet parser with header aliases. Carry Type, grapes/ingredient, region, country, vintage. Promotion can be stored as notes or future promotion price field.
notes: Some rows have blank supplier codes, so new-SKU proposals will need name/size/vintage matching and human review.

header_detection: Large PDF catalogue. Repeated table header: CODE NAME APPELLATION VINTAGE RATING UNIT PACK PRICE. Sections include wine, spirits, fortified, sake, liqueur, RTD. Footer says prices include 7% VAT.
vat_handling: prices are in THB per bottle including 7% VAT
normalization_strategy: PDF table extractor can draft rows using code-prefixed lines and repeated header blocks. Treat asterisk special-condition marker and multi-line ratings as notes. Product admin review required before import.
notes: Strong supplier item codes make matching safer, but PDF text wraps across lines and has special condition markers.

header_detection: Workbook with many sheets/sections and repeated category headers. Common fields: Code, category-specific product column, Vintage, Size, Price/Bottle, Price/12Bottles, SRP. Includes discounts like -20%, NET, special prices, and out-of-stock notes.
vat_handling: prices subject to 7% VAT in cover notes
normalization_strategy: Spreadsheet repeated-header parser with price-expression parsing. Carry brand/producer/country section rows. Convert discounts like 1200-20% into raw price and discount fields; route NET/special/out-of-stock rows to review.
notes: Good source codes, but many section-specific headers and mixed Japanese catalogue layout sections require validation.

header_detection: PDF proposal/catalogues split by region. Item blocks expose description, year, unit price, special price, wine type, item code, alcohol, region, stock note, grape/spec, and bottle size. Footer says prices exclude 7% VAT.
normalization_strategy: PDF block extractor across all files in latest folder. Use item code and product description, preserve region/grape/stock notes. Product admin review required due PDF ordering and multi-file source.
notes: Latest folder has multiple PDFs for Spanish/New World, French, and Italian wines. Need combine all files in one batch.
